name: Build Android env

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

permissions:
  contents: write
  actions: write

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
          persist-credentials: true

      - name: Set up Flutter (stable)
        uses: subosito/flutter-action@v2
        with:
        flutter-version: 'stable'

      - name: Ensure Android folder exists
    run: |
      if [ ! -d android ]; then
        echo "android/ missing — creating Android support with flutter create"
        flutter create --platforms=android .
      else
        echo "android/ already exists"
      fi

      - name: Install packages
         run: flutter pub get

      - name: Show outdated dependencies (informational)
         run: flutter pub outdated || true

      - name: Upgrade dependencies to latest (including major versions)
        run: |
       flutter pub upgrade --major-versions
       flutter pub get

      - name: Static analysis (optional, non-fatal)
         run: flutter analyze || true

      - name: Commit and push created/updated files
    env:
      GIT_BRANCH: ${{ github.ref_name }}
      run: |
       git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
       git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
       git add android pubspec.lock
       git add pubspec.yaml || true
       if git diff --staged --quiet; then
        echo "No changes to commit"
       else
        git commit -m "chore(ci): create android folder (if missing) and upgrade Flutter/Dart dependencies to latest versions"
        # Push to the current branch/ref. For workflow_dispatch this will push to default branch (HEAD).
        git push origin HEAD
       fi
